.. STM32_Communication documentation master file
   You can adapt this file completely to your liking, but it should at least
   contain the root `toctree` directive.

Welcome to STM32_Communication's documentation!
===============================================

This module provides a Python interface for communicating with an STM32 device over serial connection. 
It handles packet parsing, byte stuffing, CRC validation, and data extraction.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Contents:
   
   installation
   usage
   api
